name: pinpoint
description: Pinpoint desktop MVP for saving and replaying YouTube videos and playlists.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix electron && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -k "mvn -f backend/pom.xml spring-boot:run" "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix electron run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix electron run build && mvn -f backend/pom.xml -q -DskipTests package
